abortCherryPick.message: Abort the current cherry-pick? All cherry-pick progress will be discarded.
abortCherryPick.title: Abort Cherry-pick

abortMerge.message: Abort the current merge? All merge changes will be discarded.
abortMerge.title: Abort Merge

abortRebase.message: Abort the current rebase? All rebase progress will be discarded.
abortRebase.title: Abort Rebase

abortRevert.message: Abort the current revert? All revert progress will be discarded.
abortRevert.title: Abort Revert

deleteBranch.message: Delete branch "{{branch}}"? This cannot be undone.
deleteBranch.title: Delete Branch

deleteRemoteBranch.message: Delete remote branch "{{remote}}/{{branch}}"? This cannot be undone.
deleteRemoteBranch.title: Delete Remote Branch

deleteRemoteTag.message: Delete tag "{{tag}}" from remote "{{remote}}"? This cannot be undone.
deleteRemoteTag.title: Delete Remote Tag

deleteTag.message: Delete tag "{{tag}}"? This cannot be undone.
deleteTag.title: Delete Tag

forceDeleteBranch.message: Force delete branch "{{branch}}"? This will delete it even if it has unmerged changes or is checked out in a worktree.
forceDeleteBranch.title: Force Delete Branch

removeRemote.message: Remove remote "{{remote}}"? This will also delete all remote-tracking branches for this remote.
removeRemote.title: Remove Remote

resetToCommit.mixedDescription: HEAD will move to this commit; staged changes will be unstaged.
resetToCommit.softDescription: HEAD will move to this commit; staged changes will be preserved.
resetToCommit.title: {{mode}} Reset

stashBeforeSwitch.message: You have uncommitted changes. Stash and switch to "{{target}}"?
stashBeforeSwitch.title: Switch Branch

emptyState.subtitle: Clone a project, initialise a new repository, or open an existing one.
emptyState.title: No repository open

log.remoteRenamedUrlFailed: Remote renamed to "{{remote}}" but URL update failed: {{message}}

toast.cannotCherryPickDuringMerge: Cannot start cherry-pick while a merge is in progress
toast.cannotCherryPickDuringRebase: Cannot start cherry-pick while a rebase is in progress
toast.cannotMergeDuringCherryPick: Cannot merge while a cherry-pick is in progress
toast.cannotMergeDuringRebase: Cannot merge while a rebase is in progress
toast.cannotRebaseDuringCherryPick: Cannot start rebase while a cherry-pick is in progress
toast.cannotRebaseDuringMerge: Cannot start rebase while a merge is in progress
toast.cannotRevertDuringCherryPick: Cannot start revert while a cherry-pick is in progress
toast.cannotRevertDuringMerge: Cannot start revert while a merge is in progress
toast.cannotRevertDuringRebase: Cannot start revert while a rebase is in progress
toast.cannotSwitchDuringCherryPick: Cannot switch branch while a cherry-pick is in progress
toast.cannotSwitchDuringMerge: Cannot switch branch while a merge is in progress
toast.cannotSwitchDuringRebase: Cannot switch branch while a rebase is in progress
toast.bundledGitExternalToolUnsupported: External diff or merge tool "{{tool}}" could not be launched with Gitmun's bundled Git runtime. This Store build includes a minimal Git runtime, so some external tool configurations are unsupported. Choose the tool executable in Settings, try a simpler tool configuration, or resolve the file manually.
toast.checkoutFailedAfterStash: Checkout failed after stashing {{stashRef}}. Recover with git stash apply {{stashRef}}.
toast.cherryPickAlreadyInProgress: A cherry-pick is already in progress
toast.cherryPickBlockedByChanges: Commit or stash changes before cherry-picking
toast.cherryPickConflicts_one: Cherry-pick conflict in {{count}} file - resolve in the Changes tab
toast.cherryPickConflicts_other: Cherry-pick conflicts in {{count}} files - resolve in the Changes tab
toast.chooseDifferentRebaseBranch: Choose a different branch to rebase onto
toast.commitBlockedByCherryPick: Use Continue Cherry-pick to proceed while cherry-picking
toast.commitBlockedByRebase: Use Continue Rebase to proceed while rebasing
toast.commitBlockedByRevert: Use Continue Revert to proceed while reverting
toast.integrationComplete: Integration complete. Push your branch to update the remote.
toast.mergeConflicts_one: Merge conflict in {{count}} file - resolve in the Changes tab
toast.mergeConflicts_other: Merge conflicts in {{count}} files - resolve in the Changes tab
toast.mergeBlockedByChanges: Commit or stash changes before merging
toast.pushDetached: Push is unavailable while HEAD is detached.
toast.rebaseAlreadyInProgress: A rebase is already in progress
toast.rebaseBlockedByChanges: Commit or stash changes before rebasing
toast.rebaseConflicts_one: Rebase conflict in {{count}} file - resolve in the Changes tab
toast.rebaseConflicts_other: Rebase conflicts in {{count}} files - resolve in the Changes tab
toast.revertAlreadyInProgress: A revert is already in progress
toast.revertBlockedByChanges: Commit or stash changes before reverting
toast.revertConflicts_one: Revert conflict in {{count}} file - resolve in the Changes tab
toast.revertConflicts_other: Revert conflicts in {{count}} files - resolve in the Changes tab
toast.stashFailedBranchNotSwitched: Stash failed. Branch was not switched.
toast.switchFailedAfterGenericStash: Switch failed after stashing changes. Recover with git stash pop or inspect git stash list.
toast.switchFailedAfterStash: Switch failed after stashing {{stashRef}}. Recover with git stash apply {{stashRef}}.
